title: crash in erroneous nested query
poc: select b from crash_me where\r\n crash_q.a = crash_me.a);
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE crash_me (a integer, b char(10), c boolean);
INSERT INTO crash_me (a, b, c) VALUES (1, 'test', TRUE);
CREATE TABLE crash_q (a integer, b char(10));
SELECT b FROM crash_me WHERE (SELECT a FROM crash_q WHERE crash_q.a = crash_me.a) IS NOT NULL;
